mapper.select: SELECT co.coupon_id, co.store_id, co.coupon_name, co.benefit, co.condition_text, co.expire_date, co.total_count, co.issued_count, co.max_per_user, co.status, co.created_at, co.updated_at, s.store_name FROM tb_coupon co LEFT JOIN tb_store s ON co.store_id = s.store_id WHERE co.coupon_id = #{couponId} AND co.is_deleted = 0 AND co.status = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT co.coupon_id, co.store_id, co.coupon_name, co.benefit, co.condition_text, co.expire_date, co.total_count, co.issued_count, co.max_per_user, co.status, co.created_at FROM tb_coupon co WHERE co.store_id = #{storeId} AND co.status = 'ACTIVE' AND co.is_deleted = 0 ORDER BY co.created_at DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_user_coupon (user_id, coupon_id, coupon_code, status, created_by, updated_by) VALUES (#{userId}, #{couponId}, #{couponCode}, 'AVAILABLE', #{createdBy}, #{createdBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_coupon SET issued_count = issued_count + 1, updated_at = NOW() WHERE coupon_id = #{couponId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT uc.user_coupon_id, uc.user_id, uc.coupon_id, uc.coupon_code, uc.status, uc.used_at, uc.created_at, co.coupon_name, co.benefit, co.condition_text, co.expire_date, co.store_id, s.store_name FROM tb_user_coupon uc JOIN tb_coupon co ON uc.coupon_id = co.coupon_id JOIN tb_store s ON co.store_id = s.store_id WHERE uc.user_coupon_id = #{userCouponId} AND uc.is_deleted = 0

SELECT uc.user_coupon_id, uc.user_id, uc.coupon_id, uc.coupon_code, uc.status, uc.used_at, uc.created_at, co.coupon_name, co.benefit, co.condition_text, co.expire_date, co.store_id, s.store_name, u.nickname AS user_nickname FROM tb_user_coupon uc JOIN tb_user u ON uc.user_id = u.user_id JOIN tb_coupon co ON uc.coupon_id = co.coupon_id JOIN tb_store s ON co.store_id = s.store_id WHERE uc.coupon_code = #{couponCode} AND uc.is_deleted = 0
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_user_coupon SET status = 'USED', used_at = NOW(), updated_by = #{updatedBy}, updated_at = NOW() WHERE user_coupon_id = #{userCouponId} AND is_deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tb_review WHERE user_coupon_id = #{userCouponId} AND status = 'ACTIVE' AND is_deleted = 0
